ddls:
CREATE TABLE "options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each options contract */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the underlying asset */,
  "strike_price" REAL /* Strike price of the option */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of option (call or put) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the option */,
  "dte" INTEGER /* Days to expiration (DTE) */,
  "underlying_asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the underlying asset */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the option is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_options_underlying_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("underlying_asset_id") REFERENCES underlying_assets ("underlying_asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_options_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "underlying_assets" (
  "underlying_asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each underlying asset */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the underlying asset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the underlying asset */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of underlying asset (e.g., stock, ETF, index) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("underlying_asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the exchange is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the options contract */,
  "bid" REAL /* Bid price */,
  "midpoint" REAL /* Midpoint price */,
  "ask" REAL /* Ask price */,
  "last_price" REAL /* Last price */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of market data */,
  "market_data_date" TEXT /* Date of market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES options ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calculations" (
  "calculation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calculation */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the options contract */,
  "moneyness" REAL /* Moneyness */,
  "change" REAL /* Change */,
  "percent_change" REAL /* Percentage change */,
  "iv" REAL /* Implied volatility (IV) */,
  "delta" REAL /* Delta */,
  "gamma" REAL /* Gamma */,
  "theta" REAL /* Theta */,
  "vega" REAL /* Vega */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calculation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calculations_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES options ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role (e.g., admin, standard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the watchlist */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the options contract in the watchlist */,
  "watchlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES options ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the options contract */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., chart, graph, table) */,
  "analysis_result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES options ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the options contract related to the news article */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "article" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "news_date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES options ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the options contract related to the tweet */,
  "tweet" TEXT /* Content of the tweet */,
  "tweet_date" TEXT /* Date of the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES options ("option_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each options contract
ID of the exchange where the option is traded
Unique identifier for each underlying asset
Type of underlying asset (e.g., stock, ETF, index)
Country where the exchange is located
Unique identifier for each market data entry
ID of the user who created the watchlist
ID of the options contract in the watchlist
Type of analysis (e.g., chart, graph, table)
Unique identifier for each news article
ID of the options contract related to the news article
ID of the options contract related to the tweet
